summary: Frontend testing completed for P1 content refactorization of 3 solution pages. All solution pages successfully restructured with new 3-layer architecture, contract maturity levels, GRC Compass Core details, and tokenization infographics. Five new infographics load correctly.

design_issues.issue: Some navigation links to nosotros.html, recursos.html, contacto.html, factoria.html appear to have path resolution issues
design_issues.note: These are existing pages outside scope of current refactorization task

passed_tests: Confianza Digital page loads with 3-layer architecture (Factoria dark card, LegalTech solutions, GoCertius SuperApp)
Confianza Digital shows arquitectura-3-capas.png infographic correctly
Confianza Digital displays all required LegalTech products: Signature Manager, Noticeman, eArchiving, Credential Manager
Confianza Digital shows +40K evidencias stat in GoCertius layer
Contract Tech page loads with 3 maturity levels: Piezas LEGO (01), CLM Mono-contrato (02), CLM Posicion Contractual (03)
Contract Tech shows madurez-contractual.png infographic correctly
Contract Tech displays Contract Guardian in Linea 3 (CLM Posicion Contractual)
Contract Tech shows Contrato Computable section with state machine vision
Contract Tech displays contrato-automata.png infographic correctly
Contract Tech shows tipologias (Prestamos, Arrendamientos, Arras) in Linea 2
LegalTech & IA page loads with GRC Compass Core section
LegalTech & IA shows correct stats: 16 modulos, 31 roles RBAC, WORM, RLS
LegalTech & IA displays grc-compass.png infographic correctly
Activos Digitales page loads with tokenization content
Activos Digitales shows activo-a-token.png infographic correctly
Navigation dropdown shows La Factoria highlighted at top with proper styling
All five new infographics load correctly from /img/ directory
Homepage loads and displays correctly with updated navigation
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (minor navigation path issues for pages outside scope)
